meta.title: Chaos Engineering In ICS with Ginger Wright
meta.description:
I'll interview Ginger Wright and take your questions. Ginger Wright of INL introduced the chaos monkey to the ICSsec community. Actually causing what the organization is most worried about to improve response and resiliency. They did some of this on Plum Island. We also had Kelly Shortridge give a talk on DevOps that has many of the drivers and results in common.

Join us and provide your questions and comments.
